title: FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd:
FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE Consulting Pvt Ltd!
